title: trifolium rusbyi subsp. shastense
intro: Trifolium rusbyi subsp. shastense, also known as Rusby's clover or Shasta clover, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Trifolium rusbyi subsp. shastense include its ability to soothe bronchial congestion, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the specific application.
